name: print-calc
title: 3D Print Calculator
description: Estimate print time and filament usage from layer count, layer height, print speed, and material density — quick sanity check before you send a job
rationale: Graph signal: multiple facts from discord_history show jaboostin actively discussing a 3D printer (showing it to his dad, episode ac0471a6 and episode 5c3e92f4). No existing lab covers 3D printing tooling. A quick in-browser calculator for print time and filament estimation is a directly useful utility that doesn't require any backend persistence.
